exampleSentences: Nếu em bị ăn hiếp ở trường, hãy nói với thầy cô ngay nhé.
Anh không thích khi ai đó ăn hiếp bạn bè của mình.
Chị từng bị ăn hiếp hồi học cấp hai nên rất buồn.
notes_md:
**ăn hiếp** = to bully, to pick on someone weaker. It’s when someone uses power (size, age, status) to push others around or treat them unfairly.

It’s a verb, usually aimed at a person who is weaker or younger.  

Very close to **bắt nạt** (almost the same meaning). Opposite idea: **bảo vệ** (protect). It often implies repeated or intentional behavior, not just one small mean action.

exampleSentencesTranslated: If you are bully at school, tell your teacher right away.
I don't like it when someone bully my friends.
She used to be bully in middle school so she was very sad.
